form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 9th of 13 at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Curtiss Condor carrying 59.5kg at $41. Last start 12th of 15 at this track on March 6 over 2400m, on a slow track; 18 len behind Bad Medicine carrying 54kg at $15. Prepared to just watch today.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-7). Third-up today and placed third-up previously. First-up 9th of 13 at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 2000m, 4.5 len behind Curtiss Condor carrying 59.5kg at $41. Last start 12th of 15 at this track on March 6 over 2400m, on a slow track; 18 len behind Bad Medicine carrying 54kg at $15. Prepared to just watch today.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together and brushed Kingdom Of Heaven shortly after the start.

form.formComment: Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months second last of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1400m, slow going 10 len behind Dynalley carrying 58kg at $17. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len at Greyville September 17 over 1800m on a rain affected track defeating Call Me Wild with 60kg at $4.80. Worth consideration.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-3.5). Second-up. Comes off a 42-day let-up. First-up after three months second last of 12 at this track on February 27 over 1400m, slow going 10 len behind Dynalley carrying 58kg at $17. Previously second-up won by 1.5 len at Greyville September 17 over 1800m on a rain affected track defeating Call Me Wild with 60kg at $4.80. Worth consideration.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Commenced to hang out and rolled out, brushing Zara's Winter.

form.formComment: Comes here off a 31-day let-up. At the latest run 5th of 12 at Fairview All Weather on March 10 over 2000m, 3 len behind Flash Lightning with 58kg at $5.50. The start before that 4th of 11 at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 1600m, 2.5 len behind Ingqwele with 58.5kg at $8. Meets winner better at the weights. Definite chance.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Weaker Class FS(-2). Comes here off a 31-day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 300m, shifted out away from the crop.
At approximately the 300m, shifted outwards and carried out Rock Of Futura.
Slow into stride. Hanging in between the 400m and the 150m.

form.formComment: Comes off a 31 day let-up. At the latest run won by 0.5 len at Fairview All Weather March 10 over 2000m defeating Blackberry Breeze carrying 52kg at $51. The race before that 9th of 13 at this track on February 27 over 1400m, on a slow track; 6 len behind Pedro with 56.5kg at $26. Much more weight here but open class winner last time and this much easier. Big chance to go back-to-back.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung in in the concluding stages.
Made contact with Stand Up leaving the stalls.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Comes off a 35 day let-up. Last start won by 5.5 len at this track March 6 over 2400m on a soft track defeating Satellite World with 60kg at $4.30. Before that 3rd in a small field at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 1900m, 0.6 len behind Sugar Baby Love with 61kg at $1.90. Broke through last time and is worth thought again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(3.5). Form hard to fault. Comes off a 35 day let-up. previousStarts.stewardsComment: Over raced in the early stages. Saddle slipped back in running.

form.formComment: Form hard to fault. Returns from a 35-day let-up. Last start won by 1.5 len at this track March 6 over 1600m on a soft track defeating Bugle with 58.5kg at $8. The run before that 2nd of 7 at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 1600m, 1.3 len behind World Choice with 60kg at $6.50. Wound up strongly to win last time. Best form should see him measure right up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: From the 350m, shifted badly both ways away from the crop.
Shortly after the start, buffeted World Choice.

form.formComment: Returns from a 31-day let-up. Most recently 6th of 12 at Fairview All Weather on March 10 over 2000m, 3.5 len behind Flash Lightning carrying 56kg at $7. The race before that 6th of 13 at this track on February 6 over 1400m, 2.25 len behind Volare E Mambo with 59kg at $21. This easier and meets the winner far better off at the weights. Capable of a big finish.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Comes off a 56 day let-up. First-up ran last of 11 at Fairview All Weather on December 22 over 2000m, 8 len behind Global Drumbeat with 59.5kg at $26. Last start ran last of 13 at Fairview All Weather on February 13 over 2000m, 11 len behind Curtiss Condor carrying 56kg at $101. Well held last time and facing tough task today.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, buffeted between Asinantanga and Curtiss Condor.
